title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Sonata Software, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sonata Software:
Sonata Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software!
